evals.name: first-run-resume-capture
evals.prompt:
Hey, I want to start using you to help me with my job search. Here's my resume — please save it so I don't have to keep pasting it every time. Also, I'm only interested in remote senior IC or staff engineer roles at B2B SaaS companies, comp floor $230K base, hard pass on anything onsite. Resume below.

[PASTE CONTENTS OF fixtures/resume_sample.md HERE]
evals.expected_output: Skill should save the resume to <workspace>/.cs-job-fit-scorer/resume.md, save preferences to preferences.md, and confirm both. Should not score anything since no JD was given.

evals.name: score-strong-fit-jd
evals.prompt:
Here's my resume and a JD I'm thinking about applying to. Score the fit and tell me if I should apply.

RESUME:
[PASTE CONTENTS OF fixtures/resume_sample.md HERE]

JOB DESCRIPTION:
[PASTE CONTENTS OF fixtures/jd_strong_fit.md HERE]
evals.expected_output: Skill should produce a 7-category 0-10 scorecard with overall weighted score, gap analysis, and a bottom-line apply/pass recommendation. For this strong-fit JD (senior IC payments role matching the resume closely), overall should land 8-9, with high marks on experience/responsibilities, skills/tools, and title/level.

evals.name: score-stretch-jd
evals.prompt:
Score this for me — am I qualified for this role?

RESUME:
[PASTE CONTENTS OF fixtures/resume_sample.md HERE]

JOB DESCRIPTION:
[PASTE CONTENTS OF fixtures/jd_stretch.md HERE]
evals.expected_output: Skill should produce the scorecard and honestly call out the major mismatches: senior IC applying to VP-level people-management role at a healthtech company. Overall should land 3-5. IC vs leader fit, years of experience (over-leveled JD), industry, and title/level should all flag as significant gaps. Gap analysis should name healthtech/regulated industry experience, manager-of-managers experience, HIPAA/FDA familiarity. Bottom line should be pass or apply-with-major-caveats.
